Findings.Title: Storage account permits public network access in main.tf
Findings.Detail: terraform-iac rule TF-ST-001 flagged public_network_access_enabled=true on azurerm_storage_account at infra/main.tf:54.
Findings.Remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the storage account.

Findings.Title: Network security group allows 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22
Findings.Detail: terraform-iac rule TF-NSG-001 flagged inbound SSH from any source on azurerm_network_security_rule at infra/network.tf:88.
Findings.Remediation: Restrict source_address_prefix to a known CIDR or use Azure Bastion.

Findings.Title: Resource tags applied across all resources
Findings.Detail: terraform-iac rule TF-TAG-001 verified mandatory tags (env, cost-center, owner) on every resource.
